hero.name: Md. Abir Ul Islam
hero.title: Business Analyst
hero.intro: Instructor transitioning into business analytics with a strong foundation in mathematics, regression models, and public relations. Gaining hands-on experience with analytical tools, aiming to grow as a business analyst and future machine learning engineer.
hero.cv_url: CV of Md. Abir Ul Islam.pdf

experience.description: Driving system automation and business process re-engineering. Expert in requirement gathering (BRD/FRD), JIRA management, and UAT (User Acceptance Testing) to ensure high-impact delivery.

strategy.title: The Strategy
strategy.subtitle: Data to Market Analysis
insights: Daffodil / LearnTime: Analyzed student-parent data for satisfaction and product strategies.
Publication: Analyzing and Mitigating Linguistic Bias in Bangla NLP (BIM 2025).

items.title: Student Performance EDA
items.problem: Unidentified friction points in student exam results affecting institutional ranking.
items.approach: Performed EDA using Excel and Python to identify correlation between study habits and performance.
items.impact: Identified 3 key variables that predicted 80% of student failures, enabling targeted tutoring.
items.description: Full exploratory data analysis identifying factors impacting exam results.

items.title: Zomato Market Analysis
items.problem: Lack of data-driven insights for new restaurant startups in a competitive market.
items.approach: Scraped and analyzed Zomato restaurant data to identify high-potential gaps in cuisine vs location.
items.impact: Provided actionable insights for 2 student startups, reducing market entry risk.
items.description: Market trend analysis and location-based gap identification for the food industry.

dashboards.title: Sales Performance Dashboard
dashboards.description: Interactive visualization of multi-region sales data with predictive trend analysis.

resources.title: Standard BRD Template
resources.description: A comprehensive Business Requirement Document template including Stakeholder Matrix and Functional Specs.

contact.description: Based in Dhaka. I actively combine mathematics, machine learning, and automation to create high-impact business value.
